title: Truly Vulkan
description: A really lightweight modpack, which uses Vulkan instead of OpenGL
body:
Great ultra lightweight modpack that uses Vulkan mod instead of Sodium that most modpacks use, Be aware that vulkan is incompatible with some mods, otherwise Vulkan works better than sodium on some devices and utilizes modern features that new hardware has.

Sadly right now Vulkan doesn't support Iris Shaders, but it may be implemented later.

<details>
<summary>Mods Included</summary>

Vulkan Mod
> https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod
>
> Performance mod that boosts performance A LOT! and uses Vulkan instead of OpenGL

ScalableLux
> https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux
> 
> Mod based on Starlight that improves the performance of light updates

Model Gap Fix
> https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix
> 
> Fixes gaps at the edges of models

Lithium
> https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium
> 
> General-purpose optimization mod

FerriteCore
> https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core
> 
> Reduces the memory usage of Minecraft

Entity Culling
> https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling
> 
> Hides entities and block entities that are not visible

Concurrent Chunk Management
> https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric
> 
> Designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft

Modpack also includes other mods like mod menu


</details>
